_meta.description: Quiz for aligned vs unaligned checkpoints lesson

questions.question: В чём fundamental difference aligned vs unaligned checkpoints?

options.text: Aligned: operator waits на barrier ON ALL input channels (alignment phase, blocking — long под backpressure). Unaligned (FLIP-76, 1.11+): barrier OVERTAKES in-flight records — operator snapshot immediately, in-flight records persistятся как ChannelState вместе с operator state. Checkpoint duration bounded независимо от backpressure
Aligned для batch, unaligned для streaming

questions.explanation: Aligned (default): waits for barrier на ALL N input channels (alignment phase). Под backpressure alignment может быть minute-hour. Records на blocked channels buffer-ятся в InputBuffer. Это and is ABS classic. Unaligned (FLIP-76, 1.11+): на первый barrier на любом канале — sync snapshot НЕМЕДЛЕННО, including ChannelState (in-flight records в InputBuffer и OutputBuffer). Barrier overtakes records — emit downstream right away. ChannelState persisted на recovery — restored before resume processing. Trade-offs: Aligned — cheaper recovery (no channel state restore), slower checkpoint под backpressure. Unaligned — bounded checkpoint duration, costlier recovery, larger snapshots (включают channel state).

questions.question: Hybrid mode (1.14+) — что это и почему recommended?

options.text: execution.checkpointing.unaligned: true + aligned-checkpoint-timeout: 30s. Start aligned (cheaper recovery), если alignment > 30s — escalate to unaligned (bounded duration). Best of both worlds: dünn happy path benefits aligned (cheap recovery), под backpressure не fail (escalate to unaligned). Production default
Hybrid checkpoints используют both RocksDB и ForSt

questions.explanation: Hybrid mode — production recommended pattern. Configuration: execution.checkpointing.unaligned: true + execution.checkpointing.aligned-checkpoint-timeout: 30s. Behaviour: каждый checkpoint starts aligned (cheaper recovery, simpler semantics, no channel state). Если alignment phase превышает 30s timeout — automatically escalate to unaligned (bounded duration, even under backpressure). Best of both: (a) Normal operation — aligned advantages (cheap recovery, no ChannelState overhead); (b) Under backpressure — unaligned advantages (bounded duration, no checkpoint failures). На EOS pipelines с Kafka transactions — prevents transaction timeout expiration during backpressure spikes. Production default для critical jobs.

questions.question: Buffer debloating при unaligned checkpoints — почему critical?

options.text: Unaligned checkpoints включают ChannelState (in-flight records в InputBuffer и OutputBuffer). Без buffer debloating buffer size большие (default), могут быть GBs in-flight на high parallelism. ChannelState такого размера → доминирует checkpoint size. Buffer debloating dynamically adjusts buffer size к ~1s processing data — minimizes ChannelState. Must-have для production unaligned

questions.explanation: Critical interaction. Default network buffers большие (32KB-1MB per channel) — на 1000 subtasks × multiple channels = potentially GBs in-flight. С unaligned checkpoints этот ChannelState persisted во время snapshot — fundamentally doubles checkpoint size. Configuration: taskmanager.network.memory.buffer-debloat.enabled: true, target: 1s. Buffer size dynamically adjusted к amount of data что processor могут handle in target time (1s). Result: typical buffer 10-100x smaller, ChannelState manageable. Without debloating: 500GB ChannelState на extreme backpressure. With: 5GB. 100x reduction. Production unaligned без buffer debloating — anti-pattern.

questions.question: Unaligned checkpoints поддерживают broadcast state pattern same as aligned.
questions.explanation: False. Unaligned checkpoints НЕ поддерживают broadcast state pattern (FLIP-326 — не done). Sources с broadcast state — only aligned. Reasoning: broadcast state shared между all subtasks of operator — semantics complex для unaligned (each subtask может start snapshot at different point). Не ясно как handle in-flight broadcasts. Mixed jobs работают: operators без broadcast могут использовать unaligned, operators с broadcast принудительно aligned. Production rule: если используете broadcast state pattern (для config updates, control rules) — accept aligned для тех operators, или isolate them через slot sharing groups. Альтернатива — config через filesystem polling, не broadcast.
